title: P0-G ingestion hardening baseline
purpose: Provide a minimal but executable before-and-after baseline for ingestion support-boundary honesty, limited extract handling, and fallback semantics without turning benchmark scaffolding into a new ingestion platform.
update_policy: Only update this manifest when the shipped scope for P0-G changes.
Do not overwrite living QA evidence; benchmark scaffold records complement docs/16_qa_matrix.md.
Prefer revising seed cases over expanding into a full OCR or evaluation platform during P0-G.

cases.title: Scanned / image-like reference boundary
cases.description: OCR-heavy or scanned material should stay honest about reference-only support instead of looking chunk-ready.
cases.decision_context_summary: Need to keep a scanned agreement and image attachment visible in the case, but only as source-level references until readable text or a reliable summary is supplied.

cases.title: Table-heavy limited extract boundary
cases.description: CSV / XLSX material should remain formally supported while staying honest that the first shipped path is limited table snapshot extraction.
cases.decision_context_summary: Need to use spreadsheet evidence for throughput, backlog, and unit economics, but only treat the first shipped extract path as limited snapshot extraction unless the consultant adds table interpretation or text support.
